news.t: How IFLO and GRIN Bring FCF Discipline to International Markets
Victory Capital Expands VictoryShares® Offerings with Three New ETFs

holdings.infoBox: GRIN is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are Kioxia Holdings stock at 12.20%, ASML Holding at 2.99%, Siemens Energy AG at 2.82%, Tokyo Electron at 2.66%, and Advantest at 2.48%.

overview.description: The VictoryShares International Free Cash Flow Growth ETF (GRIN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is passively managed to track an index of growth stocks from developed countries outside of the US that may have the potential to compound free cash flow generation over time. Companies are screened for growth prospects and weighted based on free cash flow calculation. GRIN was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by VictoryShares.
infoTable: Victory International Free Cash Flow Growth Index

data.title: Victory Capital Expands VictoryShares® Offerings with Three New ETFs
data.text: SAN ANTONIO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $VCTR--Victory Capital launches 3 ETFs: Pioneer Asset-Based Income (ABI), International Free Cash Flow (IFLO), International Free Cash Flow Growth (GRIN).
